visa_types.name: Digital Nomad
visa_types.documents_required:
Download the checklist for Digital Nomad visa here.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).
visa_types.visa_fees:
[tur > rus > en > Visa Fees]
Please note:
- Visa and service fees can be paid in cash or card (no QR code payment). All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing of visa application approximately takes 1 month excluding the day of submission.
Kindly plan your travel in advance as there is no facility for expediting the visa application process.
visa_types.forms:
Consent from
As per the Russian Federal Law on Personal Data Protection, all applicants who apply documents for a visa need to ensure that the consent form is signed by each applicant and submitted along with the application. Please click here to download the consent form. Please pay attention that the form is in Russian language only.
Questionnaire
You are required to submit filled questionnaire for each application along with your set of documents. Click here to download it.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A visa is a document affixed to a foreigner's passport by diplomatic missions or border services of a state, confirming the foreigner's right to enter the country and the ability to submit an application for entry to border authorities upon arrival.
VFS Global will accept applications as per the document checklists provided by the Turkish Embassy in Russia.
Applicants who are applying at the Turkey visa application center in Russia can apply maximum 90 days in advance.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A visa is a document affixed to a foreigner's passport by diplomatic missions or border services of a state, confirming the foreigner's right to enter the country and the ability to submit an application for entry to border authorities upon arrival.
VFS Global will accept applications as per the document checklists provided by the Turkish Embassy in Russia.
Applicants who are applying at the Turkey visa application center in Russia can apply maximum 90 days in advance.

## Visa Fees

[tur > rus > en > Visa Fees]
Please note:
- Visa and service fees can be paid in cash or card (no QR code payment). All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Download the checklist for Digital Nomad visa here.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 5cm x 6cm with White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.

## Processing Time
The processing of visa application approximately takes 1 month excluding the day of submission.
Kindly plan your travel in advance as there is no facility for expediting the visa application process.

## Download Forms
Consent from
As per the Russian Federal Law on Personal Data Protection, all applicants who apply documents for a visa need to ensure that the consent form is signed by each applicant and submitted along with the application. Please click here to download the consent form. Please pay attention that the form is in Russian language only.
Questionnaire
You are required to submit filled questionnaire for each application along with your set of documents. Click here to download it.

visa_types.name: Work permit
visa_types.documents_required:
Download the checklist for Work permit visa here.
If you apply for work permit visa in Krasnodar, Novorossiysk or Rostov-on-Don, kindly include in your set of documents:
1) Chamber of Commerce - a certificate or letter from the Chamber of Commerce and Industry
2) Trade Activity - a license to conduct trading activities
3) Tax Certificate - a document confirming registration with the tax authority
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).

The processing of visa application approximately takes 1 month excluding the day of submission.
Kindly plan your travel in advance as there is no facility for expediting the visa application process.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A visa is a document affixed to a foreigner's passport by diplomatic missions or border services of a state, confirming the foreigner's right to enter the country and the ability to submit an application for entry to border authorities upon arrival.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A visa is a document affixed to a foreigner's passport by diplomatic missions or border services of a state, confirming the foreigner's right to enter the country and the ability to submit an application for entry to border authorities upon arrival.
VFS Global will accept applications as per the document checklists provided by the Turkish Embassy in Russia.
Applicants who are applying at the Turkey visa application center in Russia can apply maximum 90 days in advance.

## Visa Fees

[tur > rus > en > Visa Fees]
Please note:
- Visa and service fees can be paid in cash or card (no QR code payment). All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Download the checklist for Family and friends visit visa here.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 5cm x 6cm with White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.

## Processing Time
The processing of visa application approximately takes 1 month excluding the day of submission.
Kindly plan your travel in advance as there is no facility for expediting the visa application process.

## Download Forms
Consent from
As per the Russian Federal Law on Personal Data Protection, all applicants who apply documents for a visa need to ensure that the consent form is signed by each applicant and submitted along with the application. Please click here to download the consent form. Please pay attention that the form is in Russian language only.
Questionnaire
You are required to submit filled questionnaire for each application along with your set of documents. Click here to download it.
